x-component.description: Merges adjacent inline codes in the source and target part of a text unit. Also where possible, moves leading and trailing codes of the source to inter-segment TextParts. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

removeLeadingTrailingCodes.title: Remove leading and trailing codes
removeLeadingTrailingCodes.description: Removes leading and trailing codes from the segment and place them in the inter-segment part.

mergeCodes.title: Merge codes
mergeCodes.description: Merges adjacent codes (leading/trailing codes are removed first (if option is enabled)).
